sourcePrompt: A small Vietnamese rice mill, a working shed about eight meters long with one long side open. A timber frame under a rusted corrugated-tin roof with a small roof vent, the open side revealing a chunky milling machine with a hopper and belt wheel inside, and plump grain sacks stacked on a low loading platform out front. Weathered gray wood. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
